---
title: "Sorel"
---

## Sorel

**Type:** place

### About

This was the home in Meadfoot Road, Torquay of the Rev. Joseph Hemington Harris, and his wife Jane (Yonge) Harris, sister of \'Uncle Yonge\'.  It still stands and has been divided into flats.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
